focalfunc: func NewTunnelModeServer(process process, bridge NetBridge, task *file.Tunnel) *TunnelModeServer
funcbody:
func NewTunnelModeServer(process process, bridge NetBridge, task *file.Tunnel) *TunnelModeServer {
	s := new(TunnelModeServer)
	s.bridge = bridge
	s.process = process
	s.task = task
	return s
}
